query: SELECT id, name, criterion_type, criterion_value, rarity, description, is_active FROM badges WHERE name LIKE '%Chute%' OR name LIKE '%chute%' OR criterion_type LIKE '%exact%' OR criterion_type LIKE '%score%' LIMIT 20;
